<?php // This file was auto-generated from sdk-root/src/data/ecr/2015-09-21/waiters-2.json return [ 'version' => 2, 'waiters' => [ 'ImageScanComplete' => [ 'description' => 'Wait until an image scan is complete and findings can be accessed', 'operation' => 'DescribeImageScanFindings', 'delay' => 5, 'maxAttempts' => 60, 'acceptors' => [ [ 'state' => 'success', 'matcher' => 'path', 'argument' => 'imageScanStatus.status', 'expected' => 'COMPLETE', ], [ 'state' => 'failure', 'matcher' => 'path', 'argument' => 'imageScanStatus.status', 'expected' => 'FAILED', ], ], ], 'LifecyclePolicyPreviewComplete' => [ 'description' => 'Wait until a lifecycle policy preview request is complete and results can be accessed', 'operation' => 'GetLifecyclePolicyPreview', 'delay' => 5, 'maxAttempts' => 20, 'acceptors' => [ [ 'state' => 'success', 'matcher' => 'path', 'argument' => 'status', 'expected' => 'COMPLETE', ], [ 'state' => 'failure', 'matcher' => 'path', 'argument' => 'status', 'expected' => 'FAILED', ], ], ], ],];
